source.section: 2.1.1 - Radar Display > 2.1.1.2 - AZ/EL Format > D - FLIR Sensor Mode Sub-level

steps.action: Ensure FLIR is powered and A/A Master Mode is selected
steps.voiced: Confirm FLIR is powered and A/A Master Mode is selected.

steps.action: Set AZ/EL page on any DDI (we will take the left one), then press Sensor Control Switch LEFT to select the left DDI. Selection Diamond should be visible.
steps.voiced: Set the AZ/EL page on a DDI, then press Sensor Control Switch toward that DDI — confirm Selection Diamond appears.

steps.action: Press and hold TDC (Throttle Designation Controller), then slew TDC over a HAFU symbol in the AZ/EL page.
steps.voiced: Press and hold TDC, then slew over a HAFU symbol on the AZ/EL page.

steps.action: When TDC is released, HAFU symbol will become the L&S (Launch & Steering) Primary Target designated by the target.
steps.voiced: Release TDC — confirm HAFU becomes the L&S Primary Target.

steps.action: Press the OSB next to “IFF RDR” to select FLIR sub-page.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to IFF RDR to select the FLIR sub-page.

steps.action: In this particular situation, the FLIR line-of-sight is currently not slaved to the target we have radar locked.
steps.voiced: Confirm FLIR line-of-sight is not yet slaved to the radar-locked target.

steps.action: Press on the OSB next to RRSLV to slave the targeting pod to the radar locked target. The line-of-sight symbol should slew over the L&S.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to RRSLV to slave the pod to the radar-locked target — confirm LOS slews to L&S.

steps.action: Press FLIR DSPLY to access the FLIR feed, which will show the target through the targeting pod's sensor.
steps.voiced: Press FLIR DSPLY to view the targeting pod feed.
